title: Womb Therapy
tagline: Releasing what is held in the womb space to reclaim wholeness and flow.
descriptionHeading: Honouring the womb as a centre of creation
description1: Womb Therapy is a sacred, integrative healing modality that gently guides you back to the wisdom held within your body. Rooted in reverence for the womb as both a physical and energetic center of creation, this work weaves together intuitive bodywork, trauma release, conscious breathwork, vibrational sound healing, and the subtle yet powerful flow of Usui Reiki.
description2: Each session is a deeply attuned experience, where your body leads and your story is honored without force or expectation. Through nurturing touch and energetic alignment, stored emotions and patterns are invited to soften and release, creating space for renewal, clarity, and inner harmony. The breath becomes a bridge, the sounds a resonance, and the energy a gentle current guiding you inward. This is more than a treatment-it is a remembering. A return to your innate rhythm.
items: Somatic releasing of held tension and emotion
Womb mapping and inner landscape exploration
whoIsThisFor: Everyone with a womb. Whether you are seeking to heal from past trauma, reconnect with your body, or simply honor the sacred space within, Womb Therapy offers a compassionate and transformative journey. It is for those ready to embrace their wholeness, reclaim their power, and step into a more vibrant, embodied way of being.
